CATEGORY: PROJECTS

Project Name:
Know Janu AI Chatbot

Project Type:
AI Chatbot and RAG Application

Domain:
Artificial Intelligence
Conversational AI
Retrieval-Augmented Generation

Project Description:
Developed a personal AI chatbot capable of answering questions about Venkata Jahnavi Gunnam using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

The chatbot retrieves information from structured personal documents using semantic search and generates contextual responses using local Large Language Models.

Skills Used:
- Python
- FastAPI
- ChromaDB
- Ollama
- Phi-3
- Sentence Transformers
- React
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript

Features:
- Semantic Search
- Vector Embeddings
- Metadata-based Retrieval
- Local LLM Integration
- Context-aware AI Responses
- Real-time Conversational Interface

Core Concepts:
- RAG Architecture
- Prompt Engineering
- Vector Databases
- Semantic Retrieval
- AI Backend Development

Purpose:
Built an AI-powered portfolio assistant capable of answering questions related to skills, projects, education, experience, and achievements.
